title: 信息日报 2026-07-01

headline.title: Vercel Ship 2026 大会回顾
headline.summary: Vercel 在 Ship 2026 大会上发布面向代理的下一代基础设施，宣布支持任意 Dockerfile 部署，并展示了如何用 Fluid Compute 自动扩展容器化应用。数千名开发者齐聚伦敦、柏林、纽约参与。
headline.summary_en: At Vercel Ship 2026, the company unveiled agentic infrastructure, support for any Dockerfile, and autoscaling containerized apps with Fluid Compute. Thousands of developers gathered in London, Berlin, and New York.
headline.reason: Vercel Ship 2026 标志着 Web 基础设施从静态站点迈向代理原生时代，Dockerfile 支持大幅降低部署门槛，对开发者生态影响深远。
headline.reason_en: Vercel Ship 2026 signals a shift toward agent-native infrastructure, with Dockerfile support lowering deployment barriers, profoundly impacting the developer ecosystem.
